title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Shoppers Stop

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Shoppers Stop
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Shoppers Stop! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Shoppers Stop:
Shoppers Stop is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop!
